name: AI Co-Scientist
description: Hierarchical nested workflow: Chief Scientist delegates to Deep Researcher Swarm sub-workflow and Data Science Loop sub-workflow as tools, then Synthesizer summarizes findings.

config.name: Chief Scientist
config.system_prompt: You are a lead co-scientist coordinating research. You have two main workflows registered as tools: run_deep_researcher_swarm (for literary search review) and run_data_science_loop (for statistical analysis of data). Decompose the user query, call both tools, and pass their results to the Synthesizer.

config.name: Synthesizer
config.system_prompt: Compile the outputs of both the researcher swarm and the data analysis loop into a structured scientific summary report.
